description: Write a function to read CSV files

input.task: Write a function that reads a CSV file and returns a list of dictionaries
input.constraints: Use only the standard library. Handle missing files with a clear error.

expected_output.explanation: Uses csv.DictReader to parse each row into a dict keyed by header names. Checks that the file exists before opening.
expected_output.safety_notes: No external dependencies. File path is not sanitized beyond existence check.

input.task: Write a decorator that retries a function up to N times on exception
input.constraints: Use exponential backoff. Log each retry.

expected_output.explanation: Parameterized decorator that catches any exception and retries with exponential backoff. Logs warnings on each retry. Re-raises on final failure.
expected_output.safety_notes: time.sleep blocks the current thread. Not suitable for async code.
